PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM CHONG CHAE MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUPPERT & HURABIELL LAW FIRM,PART'P OF PROF'L CORP HURABIELL JOHN P. MR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
